description: Multi-file indirect call chain: network input flows through 3 files to reach system(). Mixed TP/FP findings.

sast_findings.message: system(): This causes a new program to execute and is difficult to use safely.
Buffer is accessed out of bounds. Possible buffer overflow.
strlen(): Does not handle unterminated strings. Ensure string is null-terminated.
Statically-sized arrays can be improperly restricted, leading to potential overflows.

threat_context.title: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')
Buffer Copy without Checking Size of Input

must_reject.reason: static array declaration is not a vulnerability
